case_title: STATE OF CALIF EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. VS JOHNSON, RAYMOND

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $630.10 FILED BY STATE OF CALIF EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT  DEPT. AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, RAYMOND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-1989 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIF EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT  DEPT. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, RAYMOND $630.10 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $650.10 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $261.70 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $454.29 ACCRUED INTEREST, $11.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, RAYMOND
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, RAYMOND
